caption: In a formal indoor setting with textured green walls and ornate wooden paneling, a man with a white beard, wearing a long white kurta and pajama, stands behind a wooden podium giving a speech. He looks down at papers on the podium and gestures with his hands as he speaks. Seated to his right are two other men; one is wearing a light-colored vest over a white shirt, and the other is partially visible behind him. A golden pillar and decorative wooden carvings are visible in the background. Across the frames, the man at the podium maintains his position and continues speaking, with slight changes in his facial expression and hand movements, while the seated men remain still. No on-screen text or logos are present in the scene.
